---
title: "Marco Souropetsis"
subtitle: "Research Associate"
description: "PhD student, Department of Communication and Internet Studies, Cyprus University of Technology. Research interests: Immersive technologies (AR/VR), gamification, and cultural heritage learning."
image: images_team/souropetsis.png
categories: [Researchers]
---

Marco Souropetsis is a Special Teaching Staff in Digital Audiovisual Production and a PhD candidate at the Department of Communication and Internet Studies, Cyprus University of Technology. His PhD research focuses on “Immersive Technologies for Cultural Heritage Learning: The Role of Fun and Gamification”. He holds an M.Sc. in Cultural Informatics and Communication and a B.Sc in Cultural Technology and Communication from the University of the Aegean. 

**Research interests:** Immersive technologies (AR/VR), gamification, and cultural heritage learning.

**Email:** markos.souropetsis@cut.ac.cy
